prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `90347967`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_90347967/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_90347967/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_90347967/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_90347967/notes.md). The rule is: keep the unique `5` fixed, and move every other nonzero cell to the point-reflected position across that `5`; everything else becomes `0`.

I discarded the sonnet hint and used the opus hint. The sonnet summary incorrectly describes a full-grid `rot180`, which is contradicted by the larger official examples; the note documents that mismatch. The generator stays close to the task family by sampling sparse, small left-of-pivot motifs with 2-4 colors and short repeated runs, then placing the pivot so both the input motif and its reflected copy remain fully in-bounds. No new shared primitive was needed.

Verification/build results: official verifier passed `4/4`, the builder produced `1000` examples, and generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/90347967/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/90347967/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/90347967/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/90347967/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/90347967/previews/preview_03.png).
